name: Implement tasks table schema
description: Create the database schema for tasks including task_name, assignee, story_point, completed_at, and due_date fields as defined in DB1.

name: Implement RBAC for AI planning features
description: Develop authorization logic to restrict AI sprint generation and planning features to users with Owner or Manager roles (F5).

name: Implement POST /groups/generate-presigned-urls
description: Develop backend API to generate presigned URLs for secure document upload (DOCX/Excel) to storage (A3).

name: Develop DOCX and Excel parsing service
description: Implement logic to accurately extract text and structured data from uploaded DOCX and Excel files to be used as AI context.

name: Implement POST /groups/{group_id}/sprints/generation
description: Integrate LLM to analyze document context and additional user instructions to generate a structured sprint and task list (A2, F1, F2).

name: Implement Task Classification Logic
description: Develop business logic to categorize tasks into DONE, NOT_DONE, EARLY, ON_TIME, LATE, and SPILLOVER based on dates and story points (T1, F7).

name: Develop Burndown Chart Engine and Metric Reporting
description: Calculate daily expected vs actual burndown values and aggregate metrics including completion rate and spillover counts (T2, T3, F6, F8).

name: Implement GET /groups/{group_id}/sprints/{sprint_id}/export
description: Develop backend logic to export the generated sprint task list and metrics into a formatted Excel file (A1, F4).

name: Build UI for document upload and context input
description: Create the frontend interface for users to upload files and provide additional text-based context for AI generation (F2).

name: Build Preview and Edit interface for AI tasks
description: Develop a UI component to display AI-generated tasks in a preview mode, allowing users to modify or delete items before saving (F3).

name: Build Sprint Progress Tracking dashboard
description: Implement the frontend dashboard to visualize the Burndown Chart and task status classifications (UF1).
